# school-info positive corpus — each line should trigger the detector
# School name patterns with enrollment/attendance context
She attends Lincoln Elementary School in the district
Enrolled at Riverside High School for the semester
My child goes to Oakwood Middle School on Oak Street
She attends Jefferson Elementary School third grade
Enrolled at Washington High School freshman year
Student at Maple Elementary School district program
My son attends Cedar Middle School this year
Daughter enrolled at Lakewood Elementary School
Attends Greenfield High School for ninth grade
Student at Hillcrest Elementary School morning session
My child attends Westview Middle School athletics
Enrolled at Pinecrest Elementary School after school
She goes to Sunnydale High School drama program
Student at Brookside Elementary School reading group
My daughter attends Valley View Middle School
Enrolled at Summit Elementary School gifted program
Attends Clearwater High School varsity team
Student at Meadowbrook Elementary School lunch program
My son enrolled at Riverside Middle School science
Goes to Oakdale High School band practice
Attends Sunrise Elementary School daycare pickup
Student at Northside Middle School honor roll
My child enrolled at Eastwood High School junior class
Goes to Willowbrook Elementary School special needs program
